hero.description: Government Senior Secondary School, Trilokpur — proudly serving the Surla region of Sirmaur, Himachal Pradesh since 1958.

vision.heading: The Values That Guide Us
vision.missionText: To provide quality education that empowers students with knowledge, values, and life skills to become responsible citizens of tomorrow.
vision.visionText: To be a centre of academic excellence and character development, rooted in our cultural heritage and open to the opportunities of the modern world.

excellence.title: Academic Excellence
excellence.desc: Consistent results under the HP State Board with dedicated teachers committed to quality instruction from Grade VI to XII.

character.title: Character Building
character.desc: Education that goes beyond textbooks — nurturing integrity, discipline, and a strong moral compass in every student.

community.title: Community Service
community.desc: Midday meal programmes, awareness drives, and outreach initiatives that keep us connected with the families we serve.

heritage.title: Cultural Heritage
heritage.desc: Annual celebrations of national festivals and local traditions keep students connected to their Himachali roots.

about.heading: A Legacy of Learning Since 1958
about.p1: Government Senior Secondary School, Trilokpur is a co-educational institution managed by the Department of Education, Himachal Pradesh. Located in the serene village of Trilokpur, in the Surla block of Sirmaur district, the school has been a cornerstone of education in the region since its establishment in 1958.
about.p2: The school offers classes from Grade VI to Grade XII under the Himachal Pradesh State Board, with Hindi as the medium of instruction. Our institution is committed to providing a safe, inclusive, and stimulating learning environment for every student.
about.p3: With a well-stocked library of 1,498 books, a spacious playground, and a dedicated faculty of 21 teachers, we ensure holistic development for all our students.
about.missionText: To provide quality education that empowers students with knowledge, values, and life skills to become responsible citizens of tomorrow.
about.visionText: To be a centre of academic excellence and character development, rooted in our cultural heritage and open to the opportunities of the modern world.

assembly.title: Morning Assembly
assembly.desc: Students gather every morning for the school assembly, where prayers, the national anthem, and important announcements set the tone for the day.

sports.title: Annual Sports Day
sports.desc: An exciting day of track and field events, cricket matches, and team sports that celebrate physical fitness and sportsmanship.

cultural.title: Cultural Festival
cultural.desc: Students perform traditional Himachali folk dances, music, and drama, showcasing the rich cultural heritage of the region.

classroom.title: Classroom Learning
classroom.desc: Engaging classroom sessions led by our dedicated faculty, with focus on interactive learning and conceptual understanding.

library.title: Library Sessions
library.desc: Students explore our collection of 1,498 books during dedicated library periods, fostering a love for reading and self-learning.

republic.title: Republic Day Celebration
republic.desc: The tricolour is hoisted with pride as students, teachers, and the community come together to honour the spirit of the Indian Republic.

academic.title: Academic Excellence
academic.desc: Consistent results under the HP State Board with dedicated teachers committed to quality instruction from Grade VI to XII.

sports.title: Sports & Activities
sports.desc: A dedicated playground fosters physical fitness, teamwork, and a competitive spirit among our students.

cultural.title: Cultural Events
cultural.desc: Annual celebrations of national festivals, cultural programmes, and local traditions keep students connected to their roots.

community.title: Community Engagement
community.desc: Midday meal programme, awareness drives, and community outreach initiatives keep us connected with the families we serve.

quote.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
